select.if: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , VNGL.RELAT_YN , MAX(VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG) AS CONFIRM_FLAG -- 거래처 반려 , MAX(VNCM.CONFIRM_REASON) AS CONFIRM_REASON , MAX(VNCE.CONFIRM_FLAG) AS EVAL_FLAG -- 거래처 승인 FROM STOCVNGL VNGL LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCVNCM VNCM ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = VNCM.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = VNCM.VENDOR_CD AND VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'R' AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCVNCM VNCE ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = VNCE.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = VNCE.VENDOR_CD AND VNCE.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'E' AND VNCE.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.IRS_NO = #{IRS_NUM} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY VNGL.RELAT_YN
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , RELAT_YN FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IRS_NUM = #{IRS_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RELAT_YN

mapper.select: SELECT MAX(A.CNT) AS CNT , MAX(A.USER_TYPE) AS USER_TYPE FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , USER_TYPE FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = UPPER(#{P_USER_ID}) AND EMAIL = #{P_EMAIL} AND REPLACE(CELL_NUM, '-','') = REPLACE(#{P_CELL_NO}, '-','') GROUP BY USER_TYPE UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , USER_TYPE FROM STOCUSER WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = UPPER(#{P_USER_ID}) AND EMAIL = #{P_EMAIL} AND REPLACE(CELL_NUM, '-','') = REPLACE(#{P_CELL_NO}, '-','') GROUP BY USER_TYPE ) A
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCCVUR SET PASSWORD = #{PPDD} , PW_WRONG_CNT = 0 , PW_RESET_FLAG = '1' , PW_RESET_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = UPPER(#{P_USER_ID})
UPDATE STOCUSER SET PASSWORD = #{PPDD} , PW_WRONG_CNT = 0 , PW_RESET_FLAG = '1' , PW_RESET_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = UPPER(#{P_USER_ID})
